Notes: Single UPDATE adds an RR to b.example.campus.edu. and then deletes the same RRset in the same message, with no prerequisites. The follow-up QUERY checks whether the RRset exists after the transaction and records the UPDATE reply behavior.

Steps.Description: Add then delete the same RRset within one UPDATE message.

Steps.Name: b.example.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RRset remains present after the UPDATE transaction.
